title: Shriek
content:
{{Characters |image = Shriek Official Poster Textless.jpg |name = Shriek |real_name = Frances Barrison |alias = {{Alias |codenames = Shriek{{Ref|VLTBC}}}} |deathDate = [[2020|November 2, 2020]] |gender = Female |species = [[Humans|Human]] ([[Mutants|mutant]]) |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |status = Deceased |movie = ''[[Venom: Let There Be Carnage]]'' |portrayed_by = [[Naomie Harris]]
[[Olumide Olorunfemi]] (young)}} {{Quote|He said the mutations are advancing. My powers are too strong.|Shriek to [[Cletus Kasady]]|Venom: Let There Be Carnage}} '''Frances Barrison''', also known as '''Shriek''', was the girlfriend-turned-wife of deranged serial killer [[Cletus Kasady]] and a former inmate at [[Ravencroft]]. She was a mutant who possessed a supersonic screech. ==Biography== ===Early Life=== ====Romance with Cletus Kasady==== {{Quote|That [[St. Estes Home for Unwanted Children|circus of a hell]], with one bright light.|[[Cletus Kasady]]|Venom: Let There Be Carnage}} [[File:YoungFBAndCK.jpg|left|{{AltFloat}}|Barrison falls in love with [[Cletus Kasady]]]] In her childhood, Frances Barrison was sent to [[St. Estes Home for Unwanted Children]], due to her possessing a [[Mutants|mutation]] that caused the power of a supersonic scream. While there, she encountered [[Cletus Kasady]] and incapacitated some of the orphans who were bullying him with her scream, later befriending him. As time passed, the two grew up and formed a romantic bond.{{Ref|VLTBC}} ====Taked to Ravencroft==== [[File:ThreadsRing.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Barrison receives a gift from [[Cletus Kasady|Kasady]]]] {{Quote|What did the doctor say?"
"He said the mutations are advancing. My powers are too strong. Cletus, I'm scared"
"It's gonna be okay"
"They are going to take me away. They're sending me to a [[Ravencroft|place]] where there are others like me"
"They can't do that. They can't take you from me. You are my one bright light|[[Cletus Kasady]] and Frances Barrison|Venom: Let There Be Carnage}} Barrison and Kasady lived together in different cells and communicated with the echo of their voices through a pipe. In [[Before 21st Century#1996|1996]], Continuing with her examinations, the doctor of the Institute told her that her mutations are advancing and becoming too strong to keep contained in that place, informing her that they would have to transfer her. [[File:YoungFB.jpg|left|{{AltFloat}}|Barrison cries informing Kasady]] Back in her room, She received a gift from Kasady, a ring of threads, to later be asked about what the doctor said. Barrison told him what was informed, saying how scared she was while putting the gift in her finger. Cletus wanted to calm her down, but she was still scared and continuated that she was going to be moved to a place with other people with other mutations. Barrison hear Cletus despair, until she was taken by the [[San Francisco Police Department]], saying to him that she loved him like goodbye. [[File:FrancesScream.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Barrison shrieks at [[Patrick Mulligan|P. Mulligan]]]] Outside, Barrison tried to raise her hand to reach Cletus while he saw him through the window. The officers put her in the back of the van, being watched face to face with the officer [[Patrick Mulligan|P. Mulligan]]. In an escape attempt, Barrison told the officer "any last words" to then use her powers at him, stunning the officer and causing the police van to fall. In the fall, Barrison tried to grab the gun from the officer, but in the struggle she was shot in the left eye, leaving her unconscious.{{Ref|VLTBC}} ===Ravencroft=== ====Life in Ravencroft==== [[File:YoungShriek.jpg|left|{{AltFloat}}|Barrison wakes up at [[Ravencroft]]]] Secretly, her unconscious body was taken to [[Ravencroft]], where she was bandaged and left lying on the bed of her cell. Later, Barrison woke up seeing how [[Camille Pazzo]], the head doctor of Ravencroft, welcome her through the door's window. Since then, Barrison lived her next years in that prison. In that place, Barrison was nicknamed "Shriek" by the staff. Also, she was mocked and abused by Dr. Camille Pazzo. At some point, her mutations caused her left eye to heal, turning it with a bright blue iris.{{Ref|VLTBC}} ====Cletus Kasady's Death Sentence==== [[File:ShriekStill.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Shriek threats the guard]] {{Quote|Your [[Cletus Kasady|little boyfriend]] is finally getting what he deserves, and the world will be a safer place without him.|[[Camille Pazzo]] to Shriek|Venom: Let There Be Carnage}} One day, Shriek was awakened after the arrival of some guards who came to give her the news. Resting on her bed, she looked at the guard with confusion and then tried to threaten him by biting the air, making them leave the cell scared. Reading the news, she found out about the Cletus Kasady's death sentence, being mocked by Dr. [[Camille Pazzo]]. She laid down again in resignation while touching the gift from Kasady from twenty four years ago, the ring of threads.{{Ref|VLTBC}} ====Reading the News==== [[File:Fractured Angel.jpg|left|{{AltFloat}}|Shriek reads [[Cletus Kasady]]'s Message]] {{Quote|That [[Grace Cathedral|distant cathedral]] is all I see, fractured angel, the other part of me.|[[Cletus Kasady]]|Venom: Let There Be Carnage}} Later, Shriek read the new written by [[Eddie Brock]] that day, where [[Cletus Kasady]] sent her an indirect message on purpose, which said "That [[Grace Cathedral|distant cathedral]] is all I see, fractured angel, the other part of me.". Shriek understanded the message. The next day, Shriek read the news about the discovery made by Eddie Brock, finding the hidden victims left by Cletus Kasady in [[Rodeo Beach]]. Knowing that they no longer need Kasady to be alive anymore, Shriek screamed in rage, flying all the papers around her.{{Ref|VLTBC}} ===[[Carnage's Rampage]]=== ====[[Rescue of Frances Barrison|Rescued]]==== [[File:Rescue of Frances Barrison.jpg|left|{{AltFloat}}|[[Cletus Kasady|Kasady]] rescues Barrison with [[Carnage]]]] {{Quote|That is so hot!|Shriek to [[Cletus Kasady]] and [[Carnage]]|Venom: Let There Be Carnage}} After [[Cletus Kasady]], now bonded to a new [[Symbiotes|symbiote]] called [[Carnage]], had escaped his death sentence, she was informed by Dr. [[Camille Pazzo|Pazzo]] that Cletus had broken out of [[San Quentin State Prison]], but taunted her not to get her hopes up since Cletus would never find her. Annoyed, Frances typed "Screw you" on the screen to Dr. Pazzo. As Pazzo continued to taunt her, Cletus showed up and used Carnage to strangle her to death while Frances watched on in shock before showing great excitement at seeing her lover again. After Cletus greeted Frances and introduced her to Carnage, she expressed amazement as Carnage crushed her cell, allowing the lovers to kiss while Carnage took out the guards.{{Ref|VLTBC}} ==== Planned Wedding ==== [[File:Carnage, Cletus and Shriek prepare their Red Wedding.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Shriek, [[Cletus Kasady|Cletus]] and [[Carnage]] plan their wedding]] Following the escape, Frances and Cletus burned down St. Estes before planning to get married. The three sought guests to attend the wedding. Frances asked for Detective Mulligan before going heading to Eddie's apartment to confront Eddie, who was secretly bonded to [[Venom]]. There, she discovered a wedding ring meant for Eddie's ex-fiancee Anne Weiying. Planning to use Anne to bait Eddie and Venom, she subdued Anne's boyfriend [[Dan Lewis]] before capturing Anne.{{Ref|VLTBC}} ====[[Duel at Grace Cathedral]]==== [[File:6915116.jpg|left|{{AltFloat}}|Shriek talking to [[Carnage]]]] [[Cletus Kasady|Cletus]] and Shriek planned to get married at a cathedral with a kidnapped minister, where [[Venom]] appears and fights [[Carnage]]. Shriek seemingly attacks and kills Mulligan with her sonic powers. Venom attacked, resulting in Carnage and Cletus fighting them. During the fight, Carnage knocked Shriek around to Cletus' protests and killed the church priest to get more power. Eventually, Carnage grew tired of Shriek's presence and tried to strangle her to death, which caused Cletus to panic and try to prevent Carnage from doing so. As the fight with Venom reached the bell tower, Venom manages to rescue [[Anne Weying]] in time and provokes Shriek to use her powers again; her sonic blast causes both [[symbiotes]] to separate from their hosts, but then Shriek falls to her death below as her scream dislodged the bell and crushes her.{{Ref|VLTBC}} ==Personality== Frances is very loyal to [[Cletus Kasady]] and protective of him as they were both neglected in their childhood, eventually falling in love in him. However, she had a dark side, as her undying love for Cletus and years of isolation at [[Ravencroft]] resulted in her committing sinister actions alongside him. Frances was also obsessed with revenge against [[Patrick Mulligan]]. However, she did have some morality; she was notably the only one to befriend Cletus in their childhood and protected him from those who bullied him, which allowed Cletus to feel happiness after living a childhood full of abuse. Additionally, despite her dark affiliation with Cletus, she argued that [[Carnage]] was going too far when he tried to kill [[Anne Weying]] and implored Cletus to stop him, showing that even she was shocked by Carnage's evil nature and didn't resort to killing those who had nothing to do with them. ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== * '''Mutant Physiology''': Shriek developed mutations at a young age, which enabled her to produce powerful sonic screams. **'''Sonic Scream''': [[File:AngryShriek.jpg|thumb|250px|Shriek screams in rage]]Shriek's primary power was that she was able to produce powerful sonic screams, capable of inflicting pain on [[Symbiotes]] and normal [[Humans|humans]]. **'''Sound Immunity''': Shriek was not affected by her sonic screams once she used them. **'''Regenerative Healing Factor''': Shriek may have possessed a limited form of regeneration, as she was able to heal her damaged eye that was shot by Patrick, though it changed coloration in the process. It is unknown if she could regenerate other parts of her body. ===Abilities=== *'''Skilled Combatant''': Shriek demonstrated some advanced hand-to-hand fighting skills. ==Equipment== ''To be added'' ==Relationships== ===Family=== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} *[[Cletus Kasady|Cletus Kasady/Carnage]] † - Husband *[[Roscoe Kasady]] - Father-in-Law *[[Louise Kasady]] † - Mother-in-Law *[[Nana Kasady]] † - Grandmother-in-Law {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Carnage]] † - Former Ally and Attempted Killer *[[Eddie Brock|Eddie Brock/Venom]] - Killer *[[Venom]] - Killer *[[Anne Weying]] - Attempted Victim *[[Camille Pazzo]] † - Abuser *[[Patrick Mulligan]] † - Attempted Victim and Attempted Killer {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, '''Frances Louise Barrison''', also known as Shriek, is an enemy of [[Spider-Man]]. *Frances underwent a redesign from comic to film. Her [[w:c:marvel:Frances_Barrison_(Earth-616)|comic counterpart]] has pale white skin and dark black hair and clothing. She also has a black diamond mark on her left eye, and both irises of her eyes are blue. In the film, Francis does not have the black diamond mark, but she does have a scar. Also, only the iris of her left eye is blue (a shimmering hue) compared to that of her right eye which is brown. *Shriek being sole Cletus Kasady's positive relationship at the orphanage where everyone abused him made her similar to [[w:c:marvel:Billy Bentine (Earth-616)|Billy Bentine]] from comics. The difference was she had better luck in bringing out the best from Cletus. ==Behind the Scenes== *[[Belle Williams]], [[Ayanna Linton]] and [[Brionna Lynch]] were stunt doubles for [[Naomie Harris]] in the role of Shriek. **[[Liva Rafidison]] was a stunt double for [[Olumide Olorunfemi]] in the role of Young Shriek. ==References== {{Gallery|Shriek/Gallery}} {{Wq|Shriek}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP|Shriek (character)|Shriek}} [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Mutants]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Villains]] [[Category:Enhanced Individuals]] [[Category:Deceased Characters]] [[Category:Venom: Let There Be Carnage Characters]] [[Category:Characters Killed by Venom]]
